---
title: "Toolkit"
bibliography: references.bib
---
# Toolkit  {.unnumbered}

A selection of tools, tips, tricks,

## Finding IIIF Resources

The IIIF Community have prepared [Guides to finding IIIF resources](https://iiif.io/guides/finding_resources/)

## IIIF Workbench

The ['IIIF Wokrbench'](https://workbench.gdmrdigital.com/) will help you keep your files organised.

## MixTape

The IIIF [MixTape](https://tripleyefish.com/mixtape/) is a handy way to collect your favourite IIIF resources.

## Exhibit

This is... https://exhibit.so/

::: {.callout-caution collapse="true"}
## To Do in Future

We have local instance at https://exhibit.cdh.cam.ac.uk/, but seems to be having an issue creating new ones at the moment.  

:::
 
## IIIF Liiive

Live collaborative annotation: https://liiive.now/  

## IIIF Cookbooks

The IIIF Community have developeda wide variety of ['Cookbooks'](https://iiif.io/api/cookbook/) to help you.
